name: Rich Text Input
summary: Advanced rich text input component using ContentEditable with image upload/insertion, slash command autocompletion, Emacs-style keybindings, auto-resize, and drag-and-drop file support.
goals: Support multi-line text input with automatic height adjustment
Enable inline image insertion via upload button, paste, or drag-and-drop
Provide slash command autocompletion with filtering and keyboard navigation
Support Emacs-style keybindings for power users

acceptanceCriteria.when: user types text and presses Enter
acceptanceCriteria.then: the message is sent to the agent and the input is cleared
a newline is inserted without sending

acceptanceCriteria.when: user pastes or drags an image
acceptanceCriteria.then: the image is encoded and inserted inline as a preview
an autocomplete popup appears with filtered results

unit-test.given: Input contains multiple images and text
unit-test.then: all content is included in the message payload

end-to-end.when: user types a message with an image and sends
end-to-end.then: the agent receives both text and image content

syncMeta.baseCommitMessage: feat(sync-specs): add auto-detection status rules in Step 5 user review
